description: Exchange two text elements with a crossing animation, placing new content at each other's position. Ideal for algebraic transposition, commutative demonstrations, and term rearrangement with sign changes. Clicking the mutator icon opens the Explorer side panel with full AsciiMath editing, live preview, and symbol picker. String editing is done in the side panel, not the toolbar dropdown.
utility: Swap two texts with crossing animation and new content

arguments.name: dest
arguments.description: First text object (receives sourceString after swap)

arguments.name: source
arguments.description: Second text object (receives destString after swap)

arguments.name: destString
arguments.description: New content to place at dest position

arguments.name: sourceString
arguments.description: New content to place at source position

alternates.syntax: textswap(dest, source, "d", "s", buff(r1, c1), buff(r2, c2))

examples.scenario: Swap x and x^2 terms in Vieta's formula
Swap a and theta selections in trig substitution simplification
examples.expression:
select_10=select(write_11,"a",1)
select_11=select(write_12,"theta",1)
text_swap_1 = textswap(select_10, select_11, "theta", "a", buff(0, 0), buff(0, 0))
